sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5878" key="a)mfi/klastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίκλαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5878.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">broken</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμφιρρώξ</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.223</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
